calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) LSH Investment group, LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness: Lydia Fong was placed under oath and direct examined.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Alejandro Luna, et al for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $ 4,929.82
Prejudgment Interest - $ 0.00
Attorney's Fees - $ 0.00 - Plaintiff to file a MOC with the court at a later date.
Costs - $ 0.00
Total judgment in the amount of $ 4, 929.82

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Lease forfeited.

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Feb-22-2012 Denied

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Feb-22-2012 Denied

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-21-2012 Continued To Feb-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff LSH Investments is present. Represented by Lydia Fong.
Attorney Jonathan Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Noemy Cruz, Daniel Roldan, Esmerelda Luna and Anayeli is present.
Attorney Alexander M. Porcaro representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of FEB-21-2012 remains on calendar.
